research_history_boundary.claim: exact-policy mechanical freeze, not a globally pristine market holdout; 2024+ remains sealed until pre-2024 performance and orthogonality gates pass

novelty_boundary.economic_axis: daily Bitcoin ledger topology: unique-address participation broadens while positive-value transfers become less concentrated inside multi-transfer transactions
not: absolute active-address, transaction, or transfer activity shock
price momentum or price reversal clock
funding, premium, basis, OI, Kimchi, DXY, or FX
REX, rolling extrema, Markov state, wick rejection, or aggTrade microstructure

metric_semantics.AdrActCnt: Coin Metrics count of unique addresses active as recipient or originator during the daily interval
metric_semantics.TxCnt: Coin Metrics count of ledger transactions during the day
metric_semantics.TxTfrCnt: Coin Metrics count of positive-value transfers; one transaction may contain multiple transfers such as batched withdrawals or payroll
metric_semantics.interpretation_limit: addresses are not users and transfer fan-out is not entity-labelled; the ratios are topology proxies, not direct exchange-flow labels

source_contract.revision_boundary: AssetEODCompletionTime enforces semantic publication latency and file hashes freeze the downloaded vintage; forward promotion still requires live-vintage parity because historical metrics can be revised

causal_feature_contract.reference: for each component, mean and sample standard deviation of the last 180 earlier observation dates whose available_at is strictly before the candidate available_at; require at least 120
causal_feature_contract.eligible: availability lag <=3 days, breadth_z>=0.5, fanout_z<=-0.5, and composite>=1.5
causal_feature_contract.event: first eligible observation after an ineligible observation

execution_contract.decision: only after the row's AssetEODCompletionTime available_at
execution_contract.earliest_tradable_open: first UTC five-minute bar open >= available_at
execution_contract.entry: one complete five-minute latency bar after earliest_tradable_open (entry_delay_bars=1)
execution_contract.exit: scheduled open 2,016 five-minute bars (seven days) after entry
execution_contract.cagr: full wall-clock split including idle cash
execution_contract.strict_mdd: global/pre-entry HWM, favorable-before-adverse held OHLC, funding, entry/exit/hypothetical liquidation costs

controls.direction_flip: primary clock, short side; diagnostic-only and never a repair or replacement
controls.breadth_component_only: long on onset of breadth_z>=1.5 without fanout or composite conditions
controls.fanout_component_only: long on onset of fanout_z<=-1.5 without breadth or composite conditions
controls.absolute_activity_control: prior chain-activity-shock clock evaluated separately; not eligible to replace NTB-7
controls.stale_topology_7d: primary topology state delayed by seven observations
controls.one_bar_delayed_entry: primary side, entry one additional five-minute bar after primary
controls.year_stratified_random_clock: same yearly trade counts and seven-day hold
controls.mechanism_rejection_rule: reject NTB-7 if either component-only or stale-topology control independently passes every primary gate

orthogonality_after_performance.comparison_set: all promoted/live/shadow sleeves frozen before NTB-7 outcomes open

rejection_contract: any support, performance, mechanism, or orthogonality failure rejects NTB-7 without changing ratios, lookback, thresholds, side, latency, or hold
